note: Capstone of the 021-025 latency push: minimum-latency stack = intra-query parallel scan (021, query-threads=8) + parallel rerank (022) + prefix (014). Single-query p50 floor ~2.6ms (768/C=2000, recall~0.97) vs 12.67ms single-thread = ~4.9x. 512/C=4000 (3.88ms) is WORSE than 768/C=2000 (2.61ms) - larger rerank C outweighs cheaper scan even parallelized; 768/C=2000 is the sweet spot. recall figures are the noisy 100-query slice; canonical recall per 018. 023/024 confirmed the compute/bandwidth ceiling (no kernel/prefetch lever left).
